title: Tomato Basil Penne with Parmesan
steps: Cook pasta in salted water until al dente.
Sauté minced garlic in olive oil for 30–60 seconds.
Add halved cherry tomatoes; cook until softened.
Toss pasta with sauce and basil.
Finish with parmesan and black pepper.

title: Lemon Garlic Chicken and Roasted Potatoes
steps: Heat oven to 220°C; cut potatoes into bite-size pieces.
Toss potatoes with half the oil, salt, pepper, and rosemary; roast 20 minutes.
Season chicken; sear in remaining oil until golden.
Add minced garlic and lemon juice/zest; cook chicken through.
Serve chicken with roasted potatoes.

title: Chickpea Spinach Curry with Rice
steps: Cook rice according to package directions.
Sauté chopped onion in olive oil until soft; add garlic and curry powder.
Add canned tomatoes, chickpeas, and coconut milk; simmer 10–12 minutes.
Stir in spinach until wilted; season with salt.
Serve curry over rice.

title: Honey Mustard Salmon with Green Beans
steps: Mix mustard, honey, and a squeeze of lemon.
Season salmon; brush with honey-mustard.
Bake salmon at 200°C for 12–15 minutes (or pan-sear 4–5 minutes per side).
Steam or sauté green beans with olive oil and salt.
Serve salmon with beans and lemon wedges.

title: Beef and Vegetable Stir-Fry with Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Sear beef in oil over high heat; remove to a plate.
Stir-fry broccoli, sliced pepper, and carrot; add garlic.
Return beef; add soy sauce and black pepper; toss 1–2 minutes.
Serve over rice.

title: Spinach Mushroom Frittata
steps: Whisk eggs with milk, salt, pepper, and grated cheese.
Sauté onion and mushrooms in oil until browned.
Add spinach to wilt; pour egg mixture over vegetables.
Cook on low 6–8 minutes until mostly set.
Finish under broiler 1–2 minutes until set.

title: Turkey Taco Rice Bowls
steps: Cook rice.
Brown turkey in oil; season with cumin and salt.
Warm beans and corn in the same pan.
Assemble bowls: rice, turkey, beans/corn, salsa, sliced avocado.
Finish with lime juice.

title: Red Lentil Tomato Soup
steps: Sauté chopped onion, carrot, and celery in olive oil 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cumin; cook 30 seconds.
Add lentils, canned tomatoes, broth, and salt; simmer 18–20 minutes.
Blend partially (optional) for a thicker texture.
Adjust seasoning and serve.

title: Greek Chickpea Salad with Feta
steps: Chop cucumber, tomatoes, and onion.
Combine with chickpeas and olives.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, and salt.
Toss salad with dressing and top with feta.

title: Zucchini Noodles with Pesto and Tomatoes
steps: Spiralize zucchini into noodles.
Sauté tomatoes in olive oil 3–4 minutes.
Add zucchini noodles; cook 2 minutes (do not overcook).
Stir in pesto; season with salt and pepper.
Top with parmesan.

title: Garlic Lime Shrimp with Couscous
steps: Prepare couscous according to package directions.
Sauté shrimp in olive oil 2–3 minutes per side.
Add butter, minced garlic, and lime juice; toss 1 minute.
Stir in parsley; season with salt and pepper.
Serve shrimp over couscous.

title: Tofu Broccoli Stir-Fry with Rice Noodles
steps: Cook rice noodles; drain.
Cube tofu; sear in oil until golden.
Add broccoli and sliced carrot; stir-fry until tender-crisp.
Add garlic, ginger, and tamari; toss.
Combine with noodles and serve.

title: Creamy Mushroom Risotto
steps: Warm broth in a saucepan.
Sauté onion and mushrooms in olive oil; add garlic.
Stir in arborio rice 1 minute; add broth a ladle at a time, stirring.
Continue until rice is creamy and tender (18–20 minutes).
Stir in butter and parmesan; season with salt and pepper.

title: Tuna Pasta Salad with Peas
steps: Cook pasta; rinse briefly under cool water and drain.
Cook peas (or thaw if frozen).
Mix tuna, chopped celery, mayo, lemon juice, dill, salt, and pepper.
Toss with pasta and peas; chill or serve immediately.

title: Black Bean Quesadillas
steps: Sauté chopped onion and pepper in olive oil; season with cumin.
Mash beans lightly and mix into vegetables.
Fill tortillas with bean mixture and cheddar.
Toast in a dry pan until crisp and cheese melts.
Serve with salsa.

title: Eggplant Parmesan Bake
steps: Slice eggplant; salt lightly and rest 10 minutes; pat dry.
Brush with oil and bake at 220°C for ~15 minutes to soften.
Layer marinara, eggplant, mozzarella, and breadcrumbs in a baking dish.
Bake 15–20 minutes until bubbly.
Top with parmesan and basil.

title: Chicken Egg Fried Rice
steps: Cook rice and cool slightly (best if pre-cooked and chilled).
Sauté diced chicken in oil until cooked through.
Push chicken aside; scramble eggs in the pan.
Add carrots and peas; stir-fry 2–3 minutes.
Add rice and soy sauce; toss until hot; season with pepper.

title: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio with Broccoli
steps: Cook spaghetti; add broccoli florets for the last 3 minutes; drain.
Gently sauté sliced garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
Add chili flakes and a splash of pasta water.
Toss in pasta and broccoli; season with salt.
Finish with lemon zest/juice.

title: Quinoa Stuffed Peppers
steps: Cook quinoa.
Sauté chopped onion in olive oil; add cumin.
Mix quinoa with beans, corn, tomatoes, and salt.
Stuff peppers; bake at 200°C for 18–20 minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Pork Chops with Apple Cabbage Slaw
steps: Shred cabbage and carrot; thinly slice apple.
Whisk vinegar, mustard, honey, and half the oil; toss with slaw.
Season pork with salt and pepper; pan-sear in remaining oil.
Cook pork 4–5 minutes per side (depending on thickness).
Serve pork with slaw.

title: Roasted Vegetable Couscous with Halloumi
steps: Chop vegetables; toss with olive oil, oregano, and salt; roast at 220°C for 18–20 minutes.
Prepare couscous according to package directions.
Sear sliced halloumi in a dry pan until golden.
Combine couscous with roasted vegetables and lemon juice.
Top with halloumi.

title: Easy Vegetable Chili
steps: Sauté chopped onion and pepper in olive oil 5 minutes.
Add chili powder and cumin; cook 30 seconds.
Add beans, canned tomatoes, corn, and salt; simmer 15–20 minutes.
Adjust seasoning and serve.

title: Spinach Ricotta Stuffed Shells
steps: Cook shells until just tender; drain.
Wilt spinach; squeeze dry; mix with ricotta, egg, salt, and minced garlic.
Spread marinara in a baking dish; fill shells with ricotta mixture.
Top with mozzarella; bake at 200°C for 18–20 minutes.
Garnish with basil.

title: Fish Tacos with Cabbage Slaw
steps: Season fish with salt and chili powder; pan-sear in olive oil until flaky.
Shred cabbage; toss with lime juice and a pinch of salt.
Mix yogurt with a squeeze of lime for a quick crema.
Warm tortillas.
Assemble tacos: tortilla, fish, slaw, yogurt crema.

title: Sesame Ginger Soba with Vegetables
steps: Cook soba; rinse under cold water and drain well.
Whisk soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, grated ginger, and sugar.
Toss noodles with shredded carrots, sliced cucumber, and scallions.
Top with sesame seeds and serve.

title: Peanut Chicken Noodles
steps: Cook noodles; drain.
Sauté sliced chicken until cooked through.
Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, lime juice, minced garlic, water, and chili flakes.
Toss noodles and shredded carrot with sauce and chicken.
Top with cilantro.

title: Caprese Chicken Skillet
steps: Season chicken with salt and pepper; sear in olive oil until cooked through.
Add garlic and cherry tomatoes; cook until tomatoes soften.
Add balsamic vinegar; simmer 1–2 minutes.
Top with mozzarella; cover until melted.
Finish with basil.

title: Falafel Pita with Tahini Sauce
steps: Blend chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, cumin, baking powder, and salt into a coarse paste.
Form small patties; pan-fry in olive oil until browned on both sides.
Mix tahini with lemon juice and a little water (from tap) to loosen.
Warm pita and slice cucumber.
Assemble pitas with falafel, cucumber, and tahini sauce.

title: Roasted Vegetable Farro Bowl with Feta
steps: Cook farro until tender; drain.
Roast diced sweet potato, broccoli, and sliced onion with olive oil, salt, and pepper at 220°C for ~20 minutes.
Toss farro with balsamic vinegar.
Assemble bowls with farro and roasted vegetables.
Top with feta.

title: Shakshuka with Eggs and Feta
steps: Sauté chopped onion and pepper in olive oil until soft.
Add garlic, cumin, and paprika; cook 30 seconds.
Add canned tomatoes and salt; simmer 10 minutes.
Make wells and crack in eggs; cover and cook until set.
Top with feta and parsley.

title: One-Pan Lemon Herb Chicken with Zucchini
steps: Slice zucchini; season chicken with salt and pepper.
Sear chicken in olive oil until golden; add minced garlic.
Add zucchini; cook until tender-crisp.
Finish with lemon juice/zest and oregano; toss and serve.

title: Mediterranean Tuna Rice Bowl
steps: Cook rice and let steam dry.
Chop cucumber and tomatoes; combine with olives.
Flake tuna and season with lemon juice, olive oil, and salt.
Assemble bowls: rice topped with salad and tuna.

title: Quick Veggie Couscous with Chickpeas
steps: Prepare couscous according to package directions.
Chop cucumber and tomatoes; combine with chickpeas.
Whisk lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, and salt.
Toss everything together and serve.

title: Turkey Burger Lettuce Wraps with Yogurt Sauce
steps: Form turkey into 2 patties; season with salt and pepper.
Sear in olive oil until cooked through.
Mix yogurt with lemon juice and a pinch of salt.
Serve patties in lettuce leaves with chopped tomato/cucumber and yogurt sauce.

title: Sheet-Pan Sausage and Peppers
steps: Heat oven to 220°C; cut peppers, onion, and potatoes into chunks.
Toss vegetables with olive oil, paprika, salt, and pepper on a sheet pan.
Nestle sausages among vegetables.
Roast 25–30 minutes, turning once, until browned and cooked.

title: Garlic Butter Green Beans with Steak Strips
steps: Season beef with salt and pepper; sear in olive oil over high heat and set aside.
Sauté green beans until tender-crisp.
Add butter and minced garlic; toss 1 minute.
Return beef; finish with lemon juice and serve.

title: Veggie Egg Scramble with Toast
steps: Sauté chopped onion and halved tomatoes in olive oil 3–4 minutes.
Add spinach to wilt.
Add beaten eggs; scramble until set; season.
Toast bread and serve alongside.

title: Tomato White Bean Skillet
steps: Sauté chopped onion in olive oil until soft; add garlic and oregano.
Add canned tomatoes and salt; simmer 6–8 minutes.
Stir in beans to warm through.
Add spinach to wilt; serve hot.

title: Chicken Caesar Salad Wraps
steps: Chop lettuce; slice chicken.
Toss lettuce with dressing, parmesan, croutons, pepper, and lemon juice.
Add chicken and mix.
Fill tortillas, wrap, and serve.

title: Baked Cod with Tomato Olive Sauce
steps: Heat oven to 200°C; season cod with salt and pepper.
Simmer tomatoes with olive oil, garlic, oregano, and olives 5 minutes.
Pour sauce over cod in a baking dish.
Bake 12–15 minutes until flaky.

title: Creamy Tomato Gnocchi
steps: Sauté garlic in olive oil for 30 seconds.
Add canned tomatoes; simmer 5 minutes.
Stir in cream and gnocchi; cook until tender.
Add spinach to wilt; season and serve.

title: Teriyaki Tofu Rice Bowl
steps: Cook rice.
Sear cubed tofu in olive oil until golden.
Stir-fry broccoli and sliced carrot until tender-crisp.
Mix soy sauce, sugar, and grated ginger; toss with tofu and vegetables; serve over rice.

title: Pesto White Bean Pasta
steps: Cook pasta until al dente; reserve a splash of water.
Warm beans and halved tomatoes with olive oil 3–4 minutes.
Add spinach to wilt.
Toss pasta with pesto and vegetables; loosen with pasta water; season and serve.

title: Sweet Potato Black Bean Hash
steps: Dice sweet potato; sauté in olive oil 10–12 minutes until tender.
Add chopped onion and pepper; cook 5 minutes.
Stir in beans, cumin, paprika, and salt.
Cook 2–3 minutes more and serve.

title: Lentil Bolognese Spaghetti
steps: Cook spaghetti.
Sauté chopped onion and grated carrot in olive oil 6–7 minutes.
Add tomatoes, lentils, oregano, and salt; simmer 12–15 minutes.
Serve sauce over spaghetti.

title: Shrimp Tomato Orzo
steps: Sauté garlic in olive oil; add orzo and toast 1 minute.
Add tomatoes plus 250 ml water; simmer until orzo is tender.
Add shrimp; cook until pink.
Stir in spinach to wilt; season and serve.

title: Veggie Fried Rice with Egg
steps: Cook rice and cool slightly.
Stir-fry carrots and peas in olive oil; add minced garlic.
Push aside and scramble eggs in the pan.
Add rice and soy sauce; toss until hot; season with pepper.

title: Greek Yogurt Chicken with Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Mix yogurt with lemon juice, minced garlic, oregano, and salt.
Sear chicken in olive oil until cooked through.
Serve chicken over rice with yogurt sauce.

title: Quinoa Avocado Lime Salad
steps: Cook quinoa and cool slightly.
Chop avocado, tomatoes, and cucumber.
Whisk lime juice, olive oil, and salt.
Toss quinoa with vegetables and dressing.

title: Chicken Veggie Noodle Soup
steps: Sauté chopped onion, carrot, and celery in olive oil 5 minutes.
Add broth and chicken; simmer 12–15 minutes.
Remove chicken, slice, and return to pot.
Add noodles; cook until tender; season and serve.

title: Burrito Bowls with Beef and Salsa
steps: Cook rice.
Brown beef; season with cumin and salt.
Warm beans and corn.
Assemble bowls with rice, beef, beans/corn, salsa, and lime juice.

title: Sesame Cucumber Chicken Salad
steps: Slice cucumber and shred carrots; slice chicken.
Whisk soy sauce, vinegar, sesame oil, and sugar.
Toss salad with dressing.
Top with sesame seeds and serve.

title: Ricotta Spinach Toasts
steps: Toast bread.
Sauté spinach with olive oil and minced garlic until wilted; season.
Spread ricotta on toast.
Top with spinach and serve.

title: Coconut Lentil Curry with Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Sauté chopped onion in olive oil; add curry powder.
Add lentils, tomatoes, coconut milk, and salt; simmer until lentils are tender.
Serve curry over rice.

title: Pork and Broccoli Stir-Fry with Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Sear pork in olive oil over high heat; remove.
Stir-fry broccoli and sliced carrot; add garlic.
Return pork; add soy sauce and pepper; toss and serve over rice.

title: Caprese Pasta with Mozzarella
steps: Cook pasta; drain.
Halve tomatoes; tear mozzarella; chop basil.
Toss pasta with olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and salt.
Fold in tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil; serve.

title: Miso-Style Soup with Tofu and Greens
steps: Bring broth to a simmer with grated ginger.
Add cubed tofu and soy sauce; simmer 5 minutes.
Stir in spinach to wilt.
Finish with sesame oil and sliced scallions; adjust salt.

title: Chicken Parmesan Pasta Skillet
steps: Cook pasta; drain.
Sear diced chicken in olive oil; season with salt and pepper.
Add marinara and pasta; toss to combine.
Top with mozzarella and parmesan; cover 2–3 minutes until melted.

title: Veggie Tostadas with Beans and Cheese
steps: Toast tortillas in a dry pan (or lightly brush with oil and toast) until crisp.
Warm beans and season with a pinch of salt.
Top tostadas with beans, cheddar, chopped tomatoes, salsa, and sliced avocado.
Serve immediately.

title: Salmon Rice Bowl with Cucumber
steps: Cook rice.
Season salmon with salt; sear until cooked through.
Slice cucumber and shred carrot.
Assemble bowls; drizzle soy sauce, sesame oil, and lime juice.

title: Chickpea Tomato Pita Pockets
steps: Chop tomatoes and cucumber; combine with chickpeas.
Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, and salt.
Warm pita briefly.
Fill pita pockets and serve.

title: Broccoli Cheddar Baked Potatoes
steps: Bake potatoes at 220°C until tender (or microwave until soft).
Steam broccoli until tender.
Split potatoes; mash insides with butter, milk, salt, and pepper.
Top with broccoli and cheddar; melt briefly in oven and serve.

title: Egg Fried Noodles with Vegetables
steps: Cook noodles; drain.
Stir-fry cabbage and shredded carrots in oil; add garlic.
Push aside; scramble eggs.
Add noodles and soy sauce; toss; season with pepper.

title: Lemon Dill White Fish with Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Season fish with salt, pepper, dill, and lemon juice.
Pan-sear fish in olive oil until flaky.
Steam green beans; serve fish and beans over rice with extra lemon.

title: Pasta Primavera with Mixed Veg
steps: Cook pasta; drain.
Sauté garlic in olive oil; add chopped vegetables and cook until tender-crisp.
Add peas and tomatoes; cook 2–3 minutes.
Toss with pasta; season with salt and serve.

title: Beef Chili with Beans
steps: Sauté chopped onion in olive oil 4–5 minutes.
Brown beef; season with chili powder, cumin, and salt.
Add tomatoes and beans; simmer 18–20 minutes.
Adjust seasoning and serve.

title: Spinach Chickpea Wraps with Tahini
steps: Mix tahini with lemon juice and a little water to loosen; add salt.
Chop cucumber; combine with chickpeas and spinach.
Dress with olive oil and a spoon of tahini sauce.
Fill tortillas and serve with remaining sauce.

title: Sausage Pasta with Tomato Sauce
steps: Cook pasta; drain.
Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil; add sliced sausage and brown.
Add tomatoes, salt, and pepper; simmer 10–12 minutes.
Toss sauce with pasta and serve.

title: Cucumber Tomato Feta Wraps
steps: Chop cucumber and tomatoes; crumble feta.
Toss with olives, olive oil, lemon juice, and salt.
Warm tortillas briefly.
Fill wraps and serve.

title: Peanut Tofu Noodles
steps: Cook noodles; drain.
Sear cubed tofu until golden.
Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, lime juice, minced garlic, and water.
Toss noodles with tofu and shredded carrots; coat with sauce and serve.

title: Spicy Black Bean Rice Bowl with Avocado
steps: Cook rice according to package directions.
Warm beans and corn in a pan with olive oil, cumin, chili powder, and salt.
Dice onion and avocado; squeeze lime over avocado.
Assemble bowls with rice and bean-corn mix.
Top with onion and avocado; finish with extra lime.

title: Crispy Potato Chickpea Skillet
steps: Dice potatoes into small cubes (about 1 cm).
Sauté potatoes in olive oil with salt and paprika until browned and tender (about 12–15 minutes).
Add chopped onion and minced garlic; cook 2 minutes.
Stir in chickpeas; warm through 2–3 minutes.
Fold in spinach to wilt; finish with black pepper.

title: Tomato Lentil Rice Pilaf
steps: Cook rice.
Sauté chopped onion in olive oil until soft; add minced garlic and oregano.
Add canned tomatoes and salt; simmer 6–8 minutes.
Stir in lentils to heat through.
Serve tomato-lentil sauce over rice.

title: Chickpea Coconut Curry Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Warm olive oil in a pan; stir in curry powder for 30 seconds.
Add tomatoes, coconut milk, chickpeas, and salt; simmer 8–10 minutes.
Stir in spinach to wilt.
Serve curry over rice.

title: Quinoa Avocado Bean Power Bowl
steps: Cook quinoa and fluff.
Warm black beans with cumin and a pinch of salt.
Dice tomatoes and avocado.
Whisk lime juice, olive oil, and salt for a quick dressing.
Assemble bowls: quinoa, beans, tomatoes, avocado; drizzle dressing.

title: Sweet Potato Black Bean Burrito Bowl
steps: Cook rice.
Microwave sweet potato (pierced) until tender, then cube (or pan-sauté cubes in olive oil 10–12 minutes).
Warm black beans with cumin and salt.
Assemble bowls with rice, sweet potato, beans, and salsa.
Finish with lime juice.

title: Lemon Chickpea Mash with Rice and Olives
steps: Cook rice.
Mash chickpeas with olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, paprika, salt, and pepper (leave some texture).
Warm the mash briefly in a pan if desired.
Serve chickpea mash over rice.
Top with sliced olives and extra lemon.

title: Herby White Bean Potato Bowl
steps: Boil diced potatoes in salted water until tender; drain.
Warm beans in a pan with half the olive oil.
Toss potatoes with beans, halved tomatoes, remaining olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Stir in chopped parsley.
Serve warm (or room temperature).

title: Smoky Bean Corn Rice Skillet
steps: Cook rice.
Sauté chopped onion in olive oil 4–5 minutes.
Add tomatoes, beans, corn, smoked paprika, and salt; simmer 8–10 minutes.
Serve the smoky bean mix over rice.

title: Garlicky Lentil Spinach Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Sauté sliced garlic in olive oil until fragrant (do not brown).
Add lentils and a pinch of salt; warm 3–4 minutes.
Fold in spinach to wilt; season with pepper.
Serve over rice with lemon juice.

title: Quick Three-Bean Quinoa Bowl
steps: Cook quinoa.
Warm mixed beans in a pan with cumin and salt.
Chop tomatoes.
Dress with lime juice and olive oil.
Assemble bowls: quinoa, beans, tomatoes; drizzle dressing.

title: Coconut Rice with Spiced Beans
steps: Simmer rice in coconut milk + water with a pinch of salt until tender.
Sauté chopped onion in olive oil; stir in curry powder for 30 seconds.
Add beans and a splash of water; warm 4–5 minutes; season with salt.
Serve spiced beans over coconut rice.

title: Citrus Cucumber Quinoa Salad
steps: Cook quinoa and cool slightly.
Dice cucumber; segment orange; chop mint.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, and salt.
Toss quinoa with cucumber, orange, and mint.
Chill briefly or serve immediately.

title: Tomato Basil White Bean Salad
steps: Chop tomatoes and thinly slice onion.
Combine beans, tomatoes, onion, and basil.
Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Toss and serve.

title: Simple Lentil Veggie Soup
steps: Sauté chopped onion, carrot, and celery in olive oil 5 minutes.
Add broth, lentils, oregano, and salt; simmer 15 minutes.
Adjust seasoning and serve.

title: Zesty Chickpea Tomato Skillet
steps: Sauté minced garlic in olive oil for 30 seconds.
Add tomatoes, salt, and chili flakes; simmer 8 minutes.
Stir in chickpeas to warm through.
Fold in spinach to wilt; finish with lemon juice.

title: Lemon Pepper Salmon with Herby Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Season salmon with salt and pepper; pan-sear in olive oil until cooked through.
Stir chopped parsley and lemon juice into rice; season lightly.
Serve salmon over herby rice with extra lemon.

title: Garlic Cod with Potato Smash
steps: Boil potatoes in salted water until tender; drain and roughly smash with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Season cod with salt and pepper; sear in olive oil 3–4 minutes per side.
Add minced garlic to the pan for the last 30 seconds.
Finish fish with lemon juice.
Serve cod with potato smash.

title: Tuna White Bean Rice Bowl
steps: Cook rice.
Combine tuna and beans; season with lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Slice cucumber.
Assemble bowls: rice topped with tuna-bean mix and cucumber.

title: One-Pan Sardine Tomato Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Sauté minced garlic in olive oil for 30 seconds; add tomatoes, oregano, and salt; simmer 8 minutes.
Flake sardines into the sauce and warm 2 minutes.
Serve over rice.

title: Red Lentil Coconut Dal with Rice
steps: Cook rice.
Sauté chopped onion in olive oil 5 minutes; add minced garlic and curry powder.
Add lentils, coconut milk, and 300 ml water; add salt.
Simmer until lentils are tender and thick (18–22 minutes).
Serve dal over rice.

title: Black Bean Sweet Potato Chili Bowl
steps: Dice sweet potato into small cubes.
Sauté chopped onion in olive oil 4–5 minutes.
Add tomatoes, sweet potato, beans, chili powder, cumin, and salt.
Simmer 22–25 minutes until sweet potato is tender and chili thickens.
Serve hot.

title: Chickpea Spinach Coconut Stew
steps: Sauté chopped onion in olive oil until soft; add minced garlic and curry powder.
Add tomatoes and coconut milk; simmer 8 minutes.
Add chickpeas; simmer 10 minutes.
Stir in spinach to wilt; season with salt.
Serve as a hearty stew.

title: Hearty Lentil Tomato Stew with Potatoes
steps: Dice potatoes; sauté chopped onion in olive oil 4 minutes.
Add paprika, lentils, tomatoes, broth, potatoes, and salt.
Simmer 25–30 minutes until lentils and potatoes are tender.
Adjust seasoning and serve.

title: Cheesy Broccoli Rice Bake
steps: Cook rice.
Steam broccoli until tender-crisp.
Mix rice with broccoli, milk, half the cheddar, butter, salt, and pepper.
Top with remaining cheddar and bake at 200°C for 12–15 minutes until melted.

title: Creamy Mushroom Rice Skillet
steps: Cook rice.
Sauté chopped onion and sliced mushrooms in olive oil until browned.
Add minced garlic; cook 30 seconds.
Stir in cream, salt, and pepper; simmer 3–4 minutes.
Toss creamy mushrooms with rice and serve.

title: Tomato Basil Pasta with White Beans
steps: Cook pasta; reserve a splash of cooking water.
Sauté minced garlic in olive oil for 30 seconds.
Add tomatoes and salt; simmer 10 minutes.
Stir in beans; warm 2–3 minutes.
Toss with pasta and basil; loosen with pasta water; season with pepper.

title: Vegetable Couscous with Chickpeas and Lemon
steps: Chop vegetables; sauté in olive oil until tender (10–12 minutes); season with salt and oregano.
Prepare couscous according to package directions.
Warm chickpeas briefly with the vegetables.
Combine couscous with vegetables and chickpeas.
Finish with lemon juice and serve.

title: Egg and Potato Breakfast Bowl
steps: Dice potatoes small; sauté in olive oil with salt until browned and tender (12–14 minutes).
Add chopped onion; cook 2 minutes.
Push potatoes aside; scramble eggs in the pan.
Combine, season with pepper, and serve.

title: Quick Tuna Corn Tortilla Tostadas
steps: Toast corn tortillas in a dry pan until crisp.
Warm beans with a pinch of salt.
Mix tuna with lime juice, olive oil, and salt.
Top tostadas with beans, tuna, and chopped tomatoes.
Serve immediately.
